launch_roles.responsibility: Confirm the seeded example is coherent enough for onboarding review.
Confirm the starter example makes lifecycle stages visible through release readiness.

checks.name: Starter story-planning proof
checks.notes: The starter example includes one bounded story pack for the canonical item.

checks.name: Starter acceptance readiness
checks.notes: The starter example includes one explicit acceptance criteria set for the bounded delivery story.

checks.name: Explicit deferred boundary
checks.notes: Launch preparation and outcome review remain explicitly not_started in the starter example.
